title: Seasonal themes
subtitle: Pick a theme — AI transforms the scene around your dish while keeping the food unchanged.

freePlan.title: Free plan
freePlan.description: Seasonal themes (AI) are available on trial and Premium. On the free plan, add your own photos in Add to menu.

noTokens.title: No tokens left
noTokens.description: Your trial continues — Premium restores theme generation.

errors.selectThemeStep2: Choose a seasonal theme or add your own (step 2).
errors.noTrialTokens: No trial tokens left. Upgrade to Premium.
errors.shareUnavailable: File sharing is not available in this browser. Use “Download”, then add the file in your chosen app.
errors.themeLoad: Could not load theme from disk.
errors.studioFetch: Could not fetch backdrop from Studio.
errors.studioUse: Could not use Studio backdrop as theme.

upload.dropzoneTitle: Drag a photo here or click to choose
upload.dropzoneHint: JPG / PNG / WEBP · up to 1 MB

customTheme.label: Custom theme
customTheme.hint: The theme changes only the scene (props, background, lighting). It does not alter the dish composition or ingredients.

preview.title: Preview ({{count}}/{{max}})
preview.emptyTitle: Your photo in the chosen theme will appear here

studioPicker.title: Choose backdrop from Studio
studioPicker.empty: No saved backdrops in Backdrop studio. Save one there first, then return here.
